title: Ramadan Mubarak 2026
message: Is barkat mahine mein mustahiqeen ki madad karen aur ajar kamayein. WorkBridge Foundation aapke saath hai.

ashras.name: Rehmat
ashras.message: Pehla Ashra: Allah ki Rehmat ka nuzool.

ashras.name: Maghfirat
ashras.message: Dosra Ashra: Gunahon se Maafi aur Maghfirat.

ashras.name: Nijat
ashras.message: Teesra Ashra: Jahannam se Nijat ka waqt.

fazail: Ramadan is the month of the Quran.
Lailat-ul-Qadr is better than a thousand months.
Fasting is a shield against evil.
The smell of a fasting person's breath is beloved to Allah.

donations.label: Iftar Dastarkhwan
donations.description: Feed a fasting worker for Rs. 300.

title: Eid ul Fitr Celebration
message: Celebrate Eid by sharing your happiness with the hard-working community.

donations.label: Eid Gifts
donations.description: Gifts and clothes for workers' children.
